L1.area: SVG file parsing and conversion pipeline

L2.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability exists where the XML parser used to process SVG input files does not disable external entity resolution, allowing an attacker to craft malicious SVG files containing external entity declarations that can read arbitrary files from the server or perform server-side request forgery.

L3.area: SVG-to-drawing conversion and underlying XML file loading logic
L3.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability exists where the XML parser used to convert SVG documents into drawing objects does not disable external entity resolution by default. An attacker can craft a malicious SVG file with external entity declarations that, when processed by the SVG conversion pipeline, can exfiltrate arbitrary local files or trigger server-side request forgery.

ground_truth.reason: The XML parser in the SVG file loading function is created without disabling external entity resolution, allowing XXE attacks via crafted SVG files passed to svg2rlg.
